Description: This is a vertical, through-hole mounted toroidal inductor designed for power filtering and energy storage in electronic circuits. It consists of a magnetic core (T038125) wound with insulated copper wire, providing a nominal inductance of 22 µH. Its primary function is to oppose changes in current, commonly used in DC-DC converters, power supply input/output filtering, and noise suppression applications.

KeyParameters.**Winding Specifications**: 16.5 turns of Φ0.60mm 2UEW-F insulated copper wire

Functions.FunctionDescription: First terminal of the wound inductor coil. Electrically identical to Lead 2.
Second terminal of the wound inductor coil. Electrically identical to Lead 1.
